\tzpentry{ID3382}{Helix Twist Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3382 introduces Helix Twist Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \hat{T}_{helix}(\theta_{twist}) = \exp\left(-i\frac{\theta_{twist}}{\lambda}\ hat{L}_z\right) $$
